content: cudarc (host-side CUDA wrapper, Rust) loads PTX via CudaContext::load_module; can compile at runtime with nvrtc::compile_ptx or load pre-compiled PTX from hand-written CUDA C. Kernel launch via builder pattern. Stream-ordered alloc via stream.alloc_zeros; dynamic-loading default (no CUDA libs at build time). Mature/maintained, widely used.
